appliedUpdates.description: Created initial user-testing.md with CLI flow validator guidance, tool paths, and concurrency settings

corpus-generators.summary: JS/TS/Rust corpus generators produce syntactically valid files parseable by ast-grep. Python default flavor remains backward-compatible.

benchmark-scripts.summary: Multi-lang AST benchmark has 4 languages with Python ratio 1.12. Rewrite benchmark handles 5000 files. Harness loop runs 5 iterations all passing. All artifacts have valid JSON with suite/epoch. AST baseline ratio 2.69 within threshold.

index-scaling.summary: Index scaling benchmark measures 3 scales (1k/5k/10k) with valid build times, file sizes, and per-query median latencies for 3 patterns.
